commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh How long shall the land mourn, and the herbs of every field wither, for the wickedness of them that dwell in it. the beasts are consumed, and the birds; because they said, He shall not see our latter end. Is not this a proof of my providence in chastising Juda. This famine is specified chap. (Calmet) Last end. Two letters seem to be transposed in Hebrew, as the Septuagint read "ways. "(Kennicott) The impious blaspheme as if all were ruled by chance.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
